subject: WM-0163 blocked
body: Allowed-path/required-check conflict: corepack pnpm sim:run -- --scenario pr1-integrated-gamesession is rejected in tools/headless-runner/src/index.ts before sim-core runner code runs, but WM-0163 allowedPaths exclude tools/headless-runner/**. Please add the focused CLI registry/test paths (or define an in-scope dynamic registration contract); sim-core must not use process.argv/Node-global workarounds.
